checkedConditions: operation_run_scope derives run:op:<trimmed operation_id> when run_id is omitted and preserves explicit run_id priority.
cleanup_swarm_workers now passes None to cleanup_swarm_workers_with_run_id so that helper can derive run scope from operation_id when no explicit run_id scope was supplied.
cleanup candidate selection can be limited to operation-derived run_id, preventing overbroad cleanup after retryable operation flows.
await_members derives the same operation-scoped run_id when no explicit member scope is provided, instead of falling back to implicit active-run detection.
Focused verification task 33486509g1 passed fmt, operation_run_scope tests, cargo check, and diff check; selfdev builds 3881287luh and 431237tjf1 passed and reload succeeded.
uncheckedConditions: A helper derives operation-scoped run_id from operation_id while preserving explicit run_id priority.
cleanup uses the derived run scope when operation_id is present and run_id is omitted.
await_members uses the derived run scope when operation_id is present and no explicit run_id/member scope is requested.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
evidence: src/tool/communicate.rs adds operation_run_scope(explicit_run_id, operation_id) and reuses it from spawned_worker_run_id.
src/tool/communicate.rs cleanup_swarm_workers_with_run_id derives run_id_scope from explicit scope/run_id or operation_id and cleanup_swarm_workers calls it without duplicating params.run_id.
src/tool/communicate.rs await_members derives requested_run_id from params.run_id or operation_id when no session_ids/target_session are present.

Verification task 33486509g1 and selfdev build tasks 3881287luh/431237tjf1 passed.
notes: This is additive and conservative. Explicit run_id still wins, explicit session/member scope disables automatic operation_id scoping for await_members, and cleanup still respects ownership, force, and target_status filters.
